title: Image 1 of The Washington daily news (Washington, D.C.), June 5, 1937
raw_ocr: Temperature Yesterday High 83 Last Night Low 65 Today 930 a m 79 1130 am81 ISth Year No 180 The 2 Cents OADSEL ews Served by Four Trunk Wires of United Press Associations WASHINGTON D C SATURDAY JUNE 5 1937 Entered Partly cloudy Local thunder showers to il i g h t and Sunday much Not i n ture change te mpera Details on Page 20 Second Class Matter by D C Post Oftce HOME EDITION 2 D C Business Man Gives Clue to Police in Death of Keene 4 V 7 F D Gives House Must List A _ Court Plan Taxes Reorganizing and Housing on Program Roosevelt Tells Leaders He Wants Action on 7Point Pro gram Before Adjournment By United Press President Roosevelt outlined to House leaders today a seven point legislative programin cluding both judicial and governmental reorganization which he desires passed at this session of Congress The President met for more than an hour with Speaker William B Bankhead D Ala Majority Leader Sam Raybun D Tex and Rep Fred M Vinson D Ky Bankhead and Rayburn outlined the following legislative projected by Roosevelt program NO COMPROMISE DISCUSSED 1 Judiciary reorganization The House probably will await
